tagline: Governed memory infrastructure for AI assistants.
core_promise: Memory is not a database. Memory is a governed decision system that decides what information is valuable enough to carry into the future.

releases.title: Governed Memory Path
releases.summary: Capture, policy evaluation, typed storage, retrieval, and audit on the write/read path.
highlights: Write path: Extractor -> Policy Broker -> Write Service
Audit log on every lifecycle action

releases.title: Agentic Governance Layer
releases.summary: Operator/developer skills and phase gates wrapping the core.

releases.title: Context Compression
releases.summary: Optional context compression at the LLM boundary, after governance.
highlights: Runs after policy/composition, never before policy broker

releases.title: pgvector + Tenant Isolation
releases.summary: Vector retrieval on Postgres with enforced row-level security.

releases.title: Loop Engineering
releases.summary: Memory workflows modeled as Observe -> Decide -> Act -> Verify -> Audit -> Learn loops.

releases.title: Railway Deployment Alignment
releases.summary: One Railway project, five services. No Vercel.

releases.title: Provider LLM Adapters
releases.summary: Swappable, provider-neutral LLM layer powering structured extraction.
highlights: LLM output is advisory; policy broker stays authoritative

releases.title: Governance UI / Memory Control Plane
releases.summary: Next.js admin/governance UI over the memory lifecycle.
highlights: Chat, memories, governance, audit, loops, admin views

releases.title: Background Lifecycle Workers
releases.summary: Six background jobs off the chat request path.

releases.title: Deletion Compaction + Vector Purge Verification
releases.summary: Clears soft-deleted content + vector material after a retention window; preserves the tombstone; verifies the purge fail-closed.
highlights: Not crypto-shred / no physical disk reclamation claim

releases.title: Railway Worker Runtime + Scheduled Lifecycle Orchestration
releases.summary: Makes lifecycle jobs operable: leases, retries/backoff, dead-letter, run history, health view.

releases.title: Public Results Dashboard + Evidence Explorer
releases.summary: Read-only public evidence/demo dashboard making the system understandable and inspectable.
highlights: Next.js remains the official product UI
